interactions.summary: He would turn 83 years old in the same year that he finishes his second term. This is a man who eats McDonald's hamburgers every day. He doesn't really work out. Yet, on the campaign trail, he's able to go to two rallies a day. And in each rally, there's 50,000 people. And he will talk on and on and on. Then at night, when he should be sleeping, he's either on social, tweeting about the world, or he's calling up repo...
